creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
There are so many exciting events happening at Dubai Festival City Mall this Ramadan!

⭐️World-breaking water and lights show with special Ramadan projections
✨Ramadan weekend fireworks on the 15th of April at 10 PM
⭐️Outdoor market in Festival Bay where you can casually dine under the stars and enjoy fun activities 
✨ Exclusive Ramadan Majlis in collaboration with Hint Cafe
⭐️ Great food offerings! Spend 250 AED or more in F&B and get rewards! 
* Spend AED 250 - Receive one ticket to Bounce X worth AED 85
* Spend AED 350 - Receive Full day access to GLOWLAND worth AED 100
* Spend AED 500 - Receive an Al Futtaim Gift card worth AED 100
✨ Ramadan vibes around the shopping mall with fun photo spots!

Tag your family and friends!
